productName: Slab Hash Rosin - Royal Girl Scout Cookies - 1g (I)
description: A chemical-free hybrid rosin, where Royal Girl Scout Cookies is pressed between heated plates until pure, golden oil weeps out and cools into a soft, creamy concentrate. A premium solventless experience, a sweet, doughy, earthy dessert aroma with a euphoric, relaxing feel, delivering a versatile, anytime balance.
